metadata.description: Fullstack development workflow: from PRD to working monorepo with React+Vite frontend and FastAPI backend. Module-by-module, feature-by-feature with testing gates.

plugins.name: fullstack-dev
plugins.description: Orchestrate fullstack development from PRD to working system. Analyzes PRD into modules and features, clones boilerplates, develops backend-first then frontend per feature, verifies integration contracts, pauses for user testing after each feature.
